description: You are a freelance wedding coordinator designing the reception layout for a 60-guest intimate wedding at a converted villa venue. Using the starter file at /home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/wedding_venue_starter.sh3d, transform the open-plan space into a complete wedding reception venue. Create and label four distinct functional zones: Grand Dining, Dance Floor, Head Table, and Bar & Lounge. Visually differentiate at least three of these zones using distinct floor colors or textures rather than walls. The layout must include at least 8 dining tables and 32 chairs in the Grand Dining area, 1 table and 4 chairs for the Head Table, and 2 tables/counters with 1 sofa in the Bar & Lounge. Decorate the space with at least 6 light fixtures and 4 plants. Save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/wedding_venue_final.sh3d.
